description_long: This is a vintage-style scooter with a heavily weathered and rusted red exterior, showing significant signs of age and wear. The body is constructed with rounded, classic contours, and the seat is wide, black, and appears to be covered in a worn, textured material. The scooter features two side mirrors mounted on a curved handlebar, and the front includes a headlight embedded in the handlebar assembly. The wheels are metallic with visible spokes, and the overall structure is compact, designed for urban commuting. The paint is chipped and corroded in many areas, exposing the underlying metal, and the foot deck is broad and flat, suitable for comfortable riding. No visible brand logo or text is present on the body.
description: A vintage, rusted red scooter with a wide, worn seat, curved handlebars, and metallic wheels, showing heavy weathering and chipped paint.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the scooter, the wide seat, and the rusted, chipped red paint on the body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the handlebar with two mirrors, the embedded headlight, and the broad front fender.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same weathered features, the seat, and the rear wheel with visible rust.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the seat, the taillight area, and the symmetrical placement of the mirrors.
attribute_deck_design: broad, flat, and metallic with visible rust and no distinct pattern
